arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti: “Bellingham is fine and is available for Atalanta”
arts.sum: “It took him a while to get into the game, he worked hard, he wasn’t accurate in the first half, but in the second he scored a fantastic goal. The goal takes a bit of pressure off him, he’s a youngster with a lot of pressure around him and it’s good for him to take some of it off.”

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti offers triple Real Madrid injury update ahead of Atalanta clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid have a quick turnaround ahead of their UEFA Champions League trip to Atalanta on December 10. Los Blancos secured a vital 3-0 La Liga weekend win at Girona but they have less than 72 hours to prepare for a showdown in Bergamo. Carlo Ancelotti is in need of a positive result, as he […] The post Carlo Ancelotti offers triple Real Madrid injury update ahead of Atalanta clash appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: What injury does Jude Bellingham have? When will he return for Real Madrid?
arts.sum: It is not the first time that the midfielder has succumbed to physical issues this season: most of Real Madrid’s squad have suffered some kind of injury throughout the current campaign, and Bellingham was out earlier in the season with a plantaris muscle injury . The game between Atalanta - Real Madrid will be played on Tuesday December 10 at Gewiss Stadium with kick off at 3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 p.m. PT .

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham Closes the Gap to Barcelona: Things We Learned From Girona 0–3 Real Madrid
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham carried Real Madrid to a decisive victory over Girona, closing the gap to Barcelona atop the table.
